name: qbo-pp-mcp
description: Interact with QuickBooks Online directly. Query ledger items, sync transactions locally, and run advanced reconciliation triage.

qbo_client_id.title: QBO_CLIENT_ID
qbo_client_id.description: Sets QBO_CLIENT_ID for the QuickBooks Online MCP server.

qbo_client_secret.title: QBO_CLIENT_SECRET
qbo_client_secret.description: Sets QBO_CLIENT_SECRET for the QuickBooks Online MCP server.

qbo_realm_id.title: QBO_REALM_ID
qbo_realm_id.description: Sets QBO_REALM_ID for the QuickBooks Online MCP server.
